ROUTE_RSDNT_EHR_CD A2124A Patient Trans - Electronic Health Record CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that the route(s) of transmission of the current reconciled medication list to the resident/family/caregiver was via electronic health record. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
